audit_items.proof_trace: Metadata refresh uses fixed 30-minute timer (MetadataRequestFrequency, line 2208) with no fork-aware acceleration. At Fulu activation, existing peers retain custody_group_count=0 for up to 30 minutes because peerPingerHeartbeat (line 2211) checks only elapsed time, not fork transitions.
audit_items.attack_scenario: All peers connected before Fulu fork retain stale custody_group_count=0 for up to 30 minutes. matchIntersection filter (line 374-384) computes zero overlap with remoteCustodyGroupCount=0, blocking data column sync network-wide during the critical fork transition window.
